items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-80 eastbound between 1.7 miles west of Exit 101: PA 255 - DUBOIS/PENFIELD and .9 miles east of Exit 101: PA 255 - DUBOIS/PENFIELD. There is a lane restriction.
